personal.name: Subodh Adhikari
personal.title: Full-Stack Developer & DevOps Engineer — Available for Freelance
personal.tagline: I take your idea from wireframe to live URL — secured APIs, role-based web apps, and Docker deployments delivered end-to-end. One developer, one point of contact, no middlemen.

about: I deliver complete, production-ready web applications — from scoping and architecture through to containerized deployment on live servers. You get one developer handling the full stack: secured backend APIs, Angular or React frontends, Docker packaging, and CI/CD pipelines. My delivered work includes a system for the Department of IT, Government of Sikkim, and CampusConnect — a live multi-role academic platform with 194 automated tests. I write maintainable code, communicate clearly at every stage, and don't hand off half-finished work.

featuredProjects.customDescription: Eliminated a 100% paper-based internship process for the Department of IT, Government of Sikkim. Built role-based automation covering applications, document management, progress tracking, and certificate issuance — delivered as a production system still in active use.
featuredProjects.liveLabel: Production system — public demo not available

featuredProjects.customDescription: MCA mini-project, later extended into a full production deployment. Multi-role academic platform serving Admins, HODs, Teachers, and Students from a single system. Containerized with Docker, deployed via GitHub Actions CI/CD to Railway, with 194 automated tests ensuring reliability.
featuredProjects.highlight: MCA Mini-Project · 194 Tests · Live on Railway

featuredProjects.customTitle: S.C.O.M.P — Stealth Collection, Outreach & Messaging Pipeline
featuredProjects.customDescription: Self-built Python CLI automation framework for personalized cold email outreach. Handles the full pipeline end-to-end — lead discovery, web scraping, email extraction, template-based copywriting, and regulated drip dispatch — tracked in a local SQLite database with a live terminal dashboard. Fully offline; no third-party LLM or paid API required.
featuredProjects.highlight: Dockerized & published to GHCR — zero paid APIs
